LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF GRAYBAR ELECTRIC COMPANY, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE THE HEARING DATE IS LESS THAN THIRTY DAYS PRIOR TO THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE AND THE COURT DID NOT APPROVE THE HEARING DATE. TRIAL IN THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 1, 2012 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. THE MOTION MAY BE RE-FILED NOTWITHSTANDING CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 437C(F)(2), BUT SHALL NOT BE RE-FILED UNTIL AFTER DETERMINATION OF THE ARBITRATION ACTION BETWEEN DEFENDANT MCGRATH ELECTRIC, INC. AND JDS BUILDERS GROUP, INC. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.
RULING: THE COURT vacates it's tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GRAYBAR ELECTRIC COMPANY, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, or alternatively, summary adjudication is off calendar- defendant dismissed from case. Judge Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
THE LAW FIRM OF HEFNER, STARK & MAROIS LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT JDS BUILDERS GROUP, INCORPORATED is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Continued To Oct-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT STROJ OF THE LANAK & HANNA, P.C., TEL. NO. (714) 550-0418 EXT. 343 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. BRUCE T. H. BURKE OF THE BURKE AND KESSLER, TEL. NO. (510)444-8100 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GRAYBAR ELECTRIC COMPANY, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Denied without prejudice because the hearing date is less than thirty days prior to the current trial date and the court did not approve the hearing date. Trial in this matter is continued to October 1, 2012 at 9:30am in department 206. The motion may be re-filed notwithstanding Code of Civil Procedure 437c(f)(2), but shall not be re-filed until after determination of the arbitration action between Defendant McGrath Electric, Inc. and JDS Builders Group, Inc. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Not reported. = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Set For Trial On Apr-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
